title: SNAPHUNT
description: A full-stack CV screening and candidate ranking system built with Next.js and Node.js, using a RAG-based architecture with LLMs and vector storage.

title: PORTFOLIO
description: Personal portfolio built with Next.js, featuring AI-driven CV sync, live skills extraction via Groq, and MongoDB-backed data persistence.

title: GLOBAL TNA
description: A job posting platform connecting users and employers.

title: FLIGHT SPOTTER
description: A flight data and price tracking system leveraging the Amadeus Self-Service API with Next.js, Firebase, and Gemini AI.

title: VIDMETRICS
description: A YouTube channel analytics tool for tracking video performance metrics.

title: QR MENU
description: A live-updating digital menu system with order confirmation via WhatsApp.

title: MERITORIOUS PAST PAPER MANAGING SYSTEM
description: A centralized past paper management system for organizing and accessing academic resources.

title: CV ANALYZER FRONTEND
description: A frontend interface for CV analysis and screening workflows.

title: EASY BUY WEB
description: An e-commerce web application with product browsing and purchasing functionality.
